xai.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23. Kept for any future xAI-using daemons.

perplexity.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23 (Apr 23 $100 incident). NEVER use Perplexity for code (CLAUDE.md rule).

anthropic.note: Hard-coded in shared_gates.py _ANTHROPIC_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Caps Haiku NC scans + ad-hoc reasoning calls. 500/day = ~$1.50/day max. Cache + 60s error cooldown protect within budget.

gemini.note: Hard-coded in gemma4_helper.py _GEMINI_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Currently only deep-verify auto-call uses it; cap is plenty of headroom.

ai_consensus.gemini:
Monitoring projects 0 calls despite 20 discovered timers—a massive blindspot for dynamic triggers.

**(a) Runaway loops:** Gemini lacks Anthropic’s 60s error cooldown. A timer bug triggering background "deep-verify" loops will instantly hit limits.
**(b) Missing caps:** There is no global USD ceiling or centralized API gateway. Caps are decentralized across individual helper files; new daemon timers will bypass them entirely.
**(c) 2x blow-up:** Perplexity caused a prior $100 incident. At 2x its 20-call cap, unbounded token payloads risk a $200+ instant blow-up.
**(d) Unseen burn:** Gemini. Without cache or cooldown protections, silent verification loop failures will drain credits undetected.

ai_consensus.grok:
**Blow-up risks:**

- **(a) Runaway loops:** Trading bot's 20 timers + any unhandled exception retry loops can bypass Anthropic's 60s cooldown and shared_gates.py cap, burning 500 calls/day ($1.50) repeatedly.
- **(b) Missing daily caps:** xAI and Perplexity only carry legacy caps from archived news_monitor.py. New trading code paths have no enforcement.
- **(c) 2x rate:** If hidden Anthropic usage exists (audit shows 0), 2x rate doubles to ~$3/day. Perplexity at 2x its 20-call legacy cap risks repeating the Apr 23 $100 incident.
- **(d) Stealth burn:** Perplexity — explicitly banned for code, past blow-up, zero projected usage makes accidental timer activation invisible until invoice.

Audit projecting $0 despite 20 timers signals incomplete instrumentation.
